outfit_info.outfit_description: A young model showcases a sophisticated yet comfortable casual look. He wears a grey logo sweater layered over a collared shirt, paired with dark striped track pants. The ensemble is completed with olive green low-top sneakers, creating a relaxed and stylish athletic-inspired outfit, suitable for everyday wear.

model_attributes.body: A young boy with a neat haircut, standing confidently with an upright posture, conveying a calm and composed demeanor.
model_attributes.pose: The model stands squarely facing forward, head slightly turned to the right, gaze distant, showcasing the full outfit.
model_attributes.background: A futuristic alien city at dusk with tall spires and a vibrant sky, creating a dramatic and otherworldly setting.

outfit.P01085827: burgundy logo cotton piqué polo shirt
